_schema: ops/social-answers.ndjson — one JSON object per line. Written by W41 (infrastructure/n8n/workflows/W41-social-question-watcher.md). Read by tools/empire-console/src/lib/data/social-answers.ts → /promote/social-answers. Fields: surfaced_at (ISO), platform (reddit|hn|google-alerts|quora), subreddit_or_topic, question_url, answered (bool), answer_url (when answered=true), posted_at (ISO), est_visits (number, backfilled from referrer logs).
